## [00:00 - 01:18]

Look, they're able to carry on without your solution. They have decided they don't need to do this right now. Why? Because they're making money right now. They're getting by right now. They don't need to do this thing. Whatever it is you're selling, CRM, social media, my body's getting on. I don't need to do the chiropractor thing. I'm fine. I don't need to go to the gym right now. I don't need to start to diet. Your product, your service, yeah, it's good. Yeah, it's probably worth it. Yeah, I should do it. But I'm able to carry on without it. So you're able to get this client in a position where they're like, I cannot. I can no longer live without your product. That is establishing what the real problem is, the sword, the problem, the pain, that pivotal thing that'll be like, I have to do something now. You got to find that out, okay? Until you do, okay? Until you find out what's that thing that says I cannot carry on without this, you're not going to make this sale. That's going to take time. You got to keep being there. It'll happen again. They showed interest once, three months ago, six months ago, nine months ago. They showed interest. They had a problem. They had a moment where they're like, I need this right now. And then that went away. You got to be there when they're ready to say, okay, I can't go without this product or this service any longer. You'll be there to make it. You'll be there when they're ready to no longer carry on without your product.
